creator: watanabe@z.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
I made a new port 'ja-platex209-1.0' for pLaTeX 2.09.
pLaTeX 2.09 is TeX macro package for ASCII pTeX, is based on LaTeX 2.09.
This port depends on ja-ptex-2.1.5 port to bulid and run, includes JIS,
Japanese EUC and SJIS version for Kanji code.

I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

Packed tarball is

  2456 Feb 22 20:23 ja-platex209-1.0-980222.tar.gz
